report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering onchain privacy infrastructure (Railgun, Aztec, Privacy Pools) and World Chain proof of personhood (World ID, AgentKit, WLD), filling key content gaps in privacy DeFi and digital identity verification.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Onchain Privacy Infrastructure 2026: Railgun reached $4.49B cumulative volume with Vitalik Buterin endorsement. Aztec Network launched Ignition Chain mainnet (Nov 2025) as first fully decentralized privacy L2. Privacy Pools launched based on Buterin's 'association lists' research — compliance-friendly mixing. 2026 dubbed Ethereum's 'HTTPS moment' for privacy. Pragmatic privacy (balancing personal privacy with regulatory compliance) is the dominant framework.

World Chain & Proof of Personhood: World Chain is an OP Stack L2 with priority blockspace for verified humans over bots. World ID has 18M+ verified users globally via iris scanning (Orb). AgentKit launched March 2026 in partnership with Coinbase/x402 — lets AI agents carry cryptographic proof they're backed by unique humans. WLD token powers governance and gas subsidies.

Gap analysis: degen0x had privacy-coins-guide-2026 (Monero/Zcash focus) but NO guide on privacy infrastructure protocols (Railgun/Aztec/Privacy Pools). No guide on World Chain, proof of personhood, or the human verification trend despite being a major 2026 narrative.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Onchain Privacy Infrastructure Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 14 min read, Intermediate): 10 sections covering what privacy infrastructure is, why it matters in DeFi, ZK proof mechanics, Railgun deep dive ($4.49B volume, proof of innocence), Aztec deep dive (Ignition Chain, Noir language), Privacy Pools (association lists), protocol comparison table (Railgun vs Aztec vs Privacy Pools vs Tornado Cash), risks & limitations, getting started guide, 6 FAQs.

World Chain & Proof of Personhood Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 13 min read, Intermediate): 9 sections covering World Chain overview, proof of personhood mechanics (Orb, verification levels), OP Stack architecture (priority blockspace, gas allowances), AgentKit & AI agent verification (x402, Coinbase partnership), World ecosystem (Mini Apps, developer tools), WLD tokenomics (10B supply), comparison table (World Chain vs Gitcoin Passport vs BrightID vs Proof of Humanity), risks & controversies, getting started guide, 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Privacy Guide: Title 'Onchain Privacy Infrastructure Guide 2026: Railgun, Aztec & Privacy Pools | degen0x'. Target keywords: onchain privacy, privacy DeFi, Railgun, Aztec Network, Privacy Pools, blockchain privacy 2026, ZK privacy, proof of innocence. Article + FAQ schemas. Internal links to 5 related pages.

World Chain Guide: Title 'World Chain & Proof of Personhood Guide 2026: World ID, AgentKit & WLD | degen0x'. Target keywords: World Chain, proof of personhood, World ID, Worldcoin, WLD, AgentKit, biometric verification, sybil resistance. Article + FAQ schemas. Internal links to 5 related pages.

Both pages: layout.tsx with Metadata export (title, description, keywords, openGraph article type with publishedTime, twitter card). StructuredData component with Article + FAQ JSON-LD in page.tsx. Breadcrumb navigation.
Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts (batch 19)
